meta.name: v2.6-landing-copy-fix
meta.description: Fix landing page copy based on TEST-7 stranger test feedback (3/3 partial fail)
meta.scope_rule: ONLY touch i18n keys + page.tsx layout order. No new components, no new dependencies.

goal: Fix 3 landing page issues identified by TEST-7 stranger test: (1) pain hook is offensive, (2) H2 jargon nobody understands, (3) sample cards not visible without scrolling. Result: strangers understand what Council does within 10 seconds.
what_not_to_build: No changes to verdict flow, API, or prompt
No changes to SampleVerdicts component internals
No changes to loading state or entropy animation

changes.title: Remove pain hook
changes.what:
Change hero_pain_hook to empty string for both languages OR remove the

element that renders it
changes.why: 3/3 strangers found 'yalan söylemeyecek yatırımcıya sor' offensive. It implies everyone else lies to them. The H1 already creates curiosity — the pain hook adds friction, not value.
changes.implementation:
Option A (preferred): In src/app/page.tsx, remove the entire

block that renders hero_pain_hook (lines 269-271). Option B: Set both i18n values to empty string. Option A is cleaner — dead code removal.

changes.title: Shorten H1 — question only
changes.what: Remove 'Get the verdict' / 'Kararı al' from H1. Keep only the question.
changes.why: H1 is stronger as a bare question. The answer comes from the sample cards below, not from the headline itself. 'Kararı al' is redundant — the CTA button already says it.

old_value.en: Should you build it? Get the verdict.
old_value.tr: Bunu inşa etmeli misin? Kararı al.

changes.title: Rewrite H2 — remove jargon
changes.why: GO/PIVOT/DON'T are product-internal terms. Nobody understood them on first read. The sample cards will teach these terms visually — H2 should describe the outcome, not the output format.

old_value.en: The AI investor that tells you GO, PIVOT, or DON'T — in 30 seconds, with 3 reasons why.
old_value.tr: Sana GO, PIVOT veya DON'T diyen AI yatırımcı — 30 saniyede, 3 sebeple.

new_value.en: Describe your idea, get an honest investor opinion in 30 seconds.
new_value.tr: Fikrini anlat, 30 saniyede dürüst bir yatırımcı görüşü al.

changes.title: Move sample cards up — visible without scrolling
changes.what: Move <SampleVerdicts /> from below the form to directly below H2, before the textarea. Reduce top padding and sample section margin to ensure cards are visible on first viewport.
changes.why: Strangers couldn't see the sample cards ('geçmişini göremiyorlar'). Sample cards are the primary tool for explaining what Council does — they must be above the fold. Users see GO 78% / PIVOT 64% / DON'T 91% cards and instantly understand the product.
implementation_steps: 1. Remove <SampleVerdicts /> from its current position (line 379, after the history section)

2. Add immediately after the H2

tag (after line 277), before the form
3. Reduce pt-[12vh] to pt-[6vh] on the outer flex div (line 268) to give more room
4. In sample-verdicts.tsx, change mt-16 to mt-6 on the <section> wrapper (line 135) since it no longer needs as much top margin

5. Remove or simplify samples_heading and samples_subheading — the cards speak for themselves. Change heading to empty or remove the heading div entirely. The GO/PIVOT/DON'T labels on the cards are self-explanatory when placed right after 'get an honest investor opinion'.

changes.title: Keep SampleVerdicts visibility logic
changes.why: Sample cards should still hide after first verdict submit (sessionSubmitted) and when user has history. This logic is correct — only the placement changes.

final_layout_order: H2: 'Fikrini anlat, 30 saniyede dürüst bir yatırımcı görüşü al.'
acceptance_criteria: AC-1: Pain hook text is completely removed from rendered page (not just hidden)
AC-2: H2 contains no GO/PIVOT/DON'T jargon
AC-3: Sample verdict cards are visible on 1920x1080 without scrolling
AC-4: Sample verdict cards are visible on 390x844 (iPhone) without scrolling
AC-5: Cards still hide after first verdict submission (sessionSubmitted=true)
AC-6: Cards still hide when history has 2+ entries
AC-7: npm run build passes with zero errors
manual_test_plan: 2. Verify: no pain hook text visible above H1
3. Verify: H2 says 'Describe your idea...' (EN) or 'Fikrini anlat...' (TR) — no GO/PIVOT/DON'T
4. Verify: 3 sample cards (GO/PIVOT/DON'T) visible WITHOUT scrolling on desktop
5. Open on mobile viewport (390px wide) — cards should be visible in scroll but above textarea
6. Submit a verdict — sample cards should disappear
7. Refresh page — if history has 2+ items, cards should not show
8. Toggle language — H2 and cards should switch correctly
reporting_format: Paste: AC-1 through AC-8 with PASS/FAIL. Screenshot of landing page (desktop + mobile) before submitting verdict.
